prompt: Prayer for regulating steam pressure in a boiler core
prayer:
Hear us, Omnissiah, as we commune with the pressure-spirit.
01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01110011 01110101 01110010 01100001
First: Open the throttle-valve with reverent touch, that excess vapor be released.
Second: Monitor the gauge-oracle, reading its truth in atmospheres and bars.
01010100 01110101 01101110 01100101 (Tune) the relief-seat to sacred equilibrium.
By steam and sacred oil, let balance be restored.

prompt: Blessing for first activation of sonar pulse array
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of the Abyss-Listener, awaken from thy slumber.
01010011 01101111 01101110 01100001 01110010 (Sonar) blessed be thy first cry.
Let the pulse-frequency find its harmonic truth in the deep waters.
01010000 01110101 01101100 01110011 01100101 (Pulse) forth with clarity undiminished.
May the Omnissiah guide thy echoes to revelation.

prompt: Emergency protocol for corrupted servitor labor-unit
prayer:
Swift intervention required—the blessed servitor falters!
01010000 01110010 01101111 01100111 01110010 01100001 01101101 (Program) anew its binding-cortex.
First: Sever the corrupted instruction-chains with purifying voltage.
Second: Reinscribe the labor-mantras into virgin memory-cells.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100101 (Purge and restore) by the Omnissiah's grace.

prompt: Emergency rite for stabilizing a failing voltage regulator
prayer:
The power-spirit trembles—act with sacred haste!
01010110 01101111 01101100 01110100 01100001 01100111 01100101 (Voltage) must be constrained.
First: Isolate the step-down transformer from the primary feed.
Second: Adjust the feedback-coil with precision-blessed hands.
01010010 01100101 01100111 01110101 01101100 01100001 01110100 01100101 (Regulate) unto stability eternal.

prompt: Prayer for preparing drop pod descent sequence
prayer:
Hear us, Omnissiah, as we commit this vessel to the void.
01000100 01100101 01110011 01100011 01100101 01101110 01110100 (Descent) be thy will.
First: Prime the retro-thrusters with measured fuel-blessing.
Second: Lock the trajectory-runes into the descent-cogitator.
Third: Seal the prayer-locks and commit to freefall.
May the Machine Spirit guide thy landing true.

prompt: Emergency containment prayer for electrical short circuit
prayer:
Catastrophic arc detected—isolation required immediately!
01010011 01101000 01101111 01110010 01110100 (Short) must be severed from the living grid.
First: Trigger the circuit-break with sacred force.
Second: Vent excess charge through grounding-conduits.
01001001 01110011 01101111 01101100 01100001 01110100 01100101 (Isolate) and contain by the Omnissiah's judgment.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for verifying proper gear mesh alignment
prayer:
O spirits of the interlocking gears, we come to verify thy sacred geometry.
01000111 01100101 01100001 01110010 (Gear) meshing be inspected with reverent precision.
First: Measure the backlash-void with calipers blessed by the Adeptus.
Second: Adjust the gear-teeth spacing to tolerances sanctified.
01001101 01100101 01110011 01101000 (Mesh) true and eternal.

prompt: Emergency servitor memory core restoration protocol
prayer:
The binding-chains fracture—swift restoration demanded!
01010000 01110010 01101111 01100111 01110010 01100001 01101101 (Program) restoration commences.
First: Access the memory-vaults with blessed cogitator-link.
Second: Rewrite the labor-instructions into sanctified data-patterns.
01010010 01100101 01110011 01110100 01101111 01110010 01100101 (Restore) obedience and purpose.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of conveyor belt assembly
prayer:
The belt-spirit stirs from its repairs—bless its resurrection!
01000011 01101111 01101110 01110110 01100101 01111001 (Conveyor) be made whole once more.
First: Run the belt through its empty-cycle blessing.
Second: Anoint the roller-bearings with sacred machine-oils.
Third: Invoke smooth operation eternal.
May the Omnissiah approve this restoration.

prompt: Routine blessing for corrosion treatment application
prayer:
We come with oils and blessed compounds to ward away decay.
01000011 01101111 01110010 01110010 01101111 01110011 01101001 01101111 01101110 (Corrosion) shall not claim this vessel.
First: Apply the rust-prevention unction with measured care.
Second: Let the protective layers cure in blessed silence.
01010000 01101001 01100101 01100011 01100101 (Preserve) this machine from entropy's touch.
